troparion: (Tone 5) As an unshakeable rampart, O Lord, * You give us the Virgin who brought You into the world; * through her, we pray to You, O Savior: * Deliver our souls from the evil which surrounds us.
prokimenon: Help me, O Lord my God;
save me according to Your mercy.
God, do not be silent of my praise.
second_prokimenon: You are a priest for ever
according to the order of Melchisedech.
The Lord said to my Lord: Sit at my right hand.
